name: Szara Gęś w Kuchni
description: Refined Polish kitchen on Rynek Główny — Old Town fine dining with goose dishes, deer tenderloin, sea trout, caviar, oysters, and a deep Polish-and-international wine list. Tasting menu format with optional wine pairing. Service fee 12.5% on tasting menus and for tables of 5+.

items.name: Siberian sturgeon caviar served with buckwheat pancakes, pickles, smoked cream
Romaine lettuce, goat cheese, cucumber, pickled shallot, chive mayonnaise
Goose slices, pear jam with mustard seeds, pistachio crunch
Sea trout, pickled cucumber, horseradish mousse, dill
Seasoned beef tenderloin tartare, Hungarian pepper syrup, trout roe
Deer tenderloin comber, hazelnuts, black truffle, black garlic cream
Sour rye soup with goose, goose sausage, quail egg
Green vegetable cream soup, cream, black truffle
Wild broccoli with roasted garlic and smoked olive oil
Dear Guests, For each tasting menu and for tables of more than 4 people, we add a service fee of 12,5%. With best regards, The Szara Gęś Restaurant Team Tasting menuFive courses menu
Homemade pasta, Bursztyn cheese, black truffle
Goose dumplings with cider, apple, sugar snap peas
Free range chicken with truffle, leek
Slow-cooked beef cheek, beetroot purée, seasonal vegetables
Sea bass fillet, butter sauce, cabbage, trout roe
Confit goose leg, red cabbage, apple gel, Suska Sechlońska plum sauce
Seasoned beef tenderloin, spinach, ruby port sauce
Millefoglie with vanilla cream, seasonal fruits
Kinley Tonic Water/ Kinley Pink Aromatic Berry
CRAFT PREMIUM BEERTrzy Korony Browar Nowosądecki Chmyz Pils
Chmyz is Pils with light grain aroma, brewed with the use of four natural ingredients: barley malt, water, hops and yeast.Trzy Korony Browar Nowosądecki Krasa Weizen
Light top-fermented beer, with a refreshing taste. Aroma composition bananas, cloves and cinnamon combined with a sour aftertasteTrzy Korony Browar Nowosądecki Sędek Wheat IPA
Light top-fermented beer with intense aroma of hops, citrus, bananas, flowers and a distinct aftertaste of bitterness.Trzy Korony Browar Nowosądecki Kicarz Koźlak
Kicarz is a distinctive and heavy beer with intense aromas of coffee, chocolate and caramel.COCTAILSLumiere Spritz
